title: cymbidium flabelliforme
intro: Cymbidium flabelliforme, also known as the Cymbidium Orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, due to its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Cymbidium flabelliforme include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and supporting respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, or dried and used in capsule or powder form to make extracts and tinctures.
